form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run won by a head at Rosehill G3 N E Manion Cup March 21 over 2400m on a rain affected track defeating Taramansour with 53kg at $5.50. The race before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a nose at this track Bm88 February 28 over 2000m in soft going defeating Bear On The Loose with 57.5kg at $5.50. Improving stayer who can keep the winning momentum going.
